title: carpinus laxiflora f. macrophylla
intro: Carpinus laxiflora f. macrophylla, also known as the Chinese hornbeam, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds found in its bark, leaves, and seeds. The health benefits of Carpinus laxiflora f. macrophylla include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and supporting the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. The tree's medicinal properties are often harnessed through herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional Chinese medicine.
